raw_text: ImageMagick has an integer overflow in despeckle operation causing a heap buffer overflow on 32-bit builds An integer overflow in the despeckle operation causes a heap buffer overflow on 32-bit builds that will result in an out of bounds write. ``` ==1551685==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: heap-buffer-overflow on address 0xea2fb818 at pc 0x56cbc42a bp 0xffc4ce48 sp 0xffc4ce38 WRITE of size 8 at 0xea2fb818 thread T0 ```
